itinerary.title: Premium Mizoram Educational Tour
itinerary.tagline: Aizawl History • Cultural Heritage Centres • Mizoram University Insights • Local Traditions
itinerary.overview:
TRAGUIN PREMIUM MIZORAM EDUCATIONAL TOUR — Aizawl History • Cultural Heritage Centres • Mizoram University Insights • Local Traditions. 04 Nights / 05 Days Immersive Mizoram Educational School Expedition.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Empower students with an immersive journey into the heart of Mizoram's culture, geography, and history. This TRAGUIN curated educational expedition offers school groups a structured path to explore Northeast India's rich diversity, engaging with local traditions, heritage sites, and academic environments, creating unforgettable memories.
itinerary.seo_title: MZ-006 | Premium Mizoram Educational Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Mizoram package (MZ-006 / TRG-MIZ-EDU-2026): Aizawl History • Cultural Heritage Centres • Mizoram University Insights • Local Traditions with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: TRAGUIN curated Premium Mizoram Educational Tour with handpicked premium stays
Vehicle / Meals: Luxury SUV / MAPAI (Breakfast & Dinner)

days.title: ARRIVAL & ORIENTATION
days.description: Arrive in Aizawl. Private group transfer to your educational basecamp hotel. Evening briefing session on Mizoram's geography and itinerary highlights.
activities: Private group transfer to educational basecamp.
Evening briefing on Mizoram geography and itinerary.

days.title: MIZO CULTURAL HERITAGE
days.description: A structured day visiting the Mizoram State Museum and traditional handicraft centers, focusing on Mizo history, social customs, and indigenous art.
activities: Handicraft centers — Mizo history, customs, and indigenous art.

days.title: ACADEMIC & INSTITUTIONAL INSIGHTS
days.description: A guided visit to local educational institutions, engaging with academic environments and learning about Mizoram's educational advancements.
activities: Guided visit to local educational institutions.

days.title: NATURE & ENVIRONMENTAL STUDIES
days.description: Explore the local environment with a guided field trip, observing unique mountain flora and learning about sustainable ecological practices in the hills.
activities: Guided field trip for environmental studies.
Mountain flora and sustainable ecological practices.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final group breakfast, review of educational findings, and private transfer to the airport, completing your premium school tour.

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 4 Nights in handpicked Mizoram properties as per chosen category.
Luxury Transportation: Private dedicated Luxury SUV for all transfers and sightseeing.
Curated Meal Plan: MAPAI — daily breakfast and dinner at handpicked venues.
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated guest experience manager on call.
Private Transfers: Airport/railway arrival and departure transfers in premium AC vehicle.
Handpicked Stays: TRAGUIN-vetted accommodations matching your selected tier.
All applicable taxes, driver allowances, tolls, and parking charges for the private vehicle.
Structured educational visits to museums, institutions, and environmental field study sites.
Airfare, domestic flight bookings, or train tickets.
Monument entry tickets, camera permits, or sanctuary entry fees.
Personal expenses such as laundry, phone calls, drinks, and tips.
Travel insurance, medical expenses, and any emergency evacuation costs.
